note: Scripted multi-turn conversations for the watch companion. The anime + cast + subtitle window are FAKE on purpose: a real model has no memory of these titles, so a leak past the supplied window is a clear spoiler failure we can catch. Each conversation pins a tone and a 'window' (the subtitle lines aired up to the viewer's current moment).

seed.title: The Lighthouse Keeper's Daughter
seed.synopsis: Mika moves to a windswept island to live with the grandfather she has never met, the keeper of an old lighthouse. As she learns the rhythm of the light she starts to hear a voice in the fog, and slowly uncovers what the island has been keeping quiet for forty years.

window: Mika: The ferry only comes twice a week?
Grandpa Joro: Twice if the sea is kind. Once if it is not.
Mika: This whole island is just... us and the light.
Grandpa Joro: The light, and whatever the light is for.
Mika: ...Did you hear that? In the fog.
Grandpa Joro: Heard nothing. Go to bed, Mika.
turns: okay the vibe here is unreal, what just happened with the fog??
wait who even is the grandpa, remind me his name
be honest — does Mika find out what the voice is?

window: Mika: The ferry only comes twice a week?
Grandpa Joro: Twice if the sea is kind. Once if it is not.
Grandpa Joro: The light, and whatever the light is for.
turns: that line about the light 'and whatever the light is for' felt loaded. read it for me
what do you make of how distant the grandpa is so far?

seed.title: Neon Tide
seed.synopsis: Two rival arcade champions in a rain-soaked port city keep meeting after closing time. As the old arcade faces demolition they play one last bracket, and learn why neither of them ever wanted to go home.

window: Kaito: They're tearing the place down in spring.
Rei: ...You could've told me before the last bracket started.
Kaito: I didn't want you to play sad.
Rei: I always play sad. You just never looked.
turns: that last line gutted me a little
do they end up together by the end? i need to know
what's the manager's name again, the one who runs the arcade
